Meaning.En: A thick, black, viscous liquid obtained from coal tar or petroleum, used for road surfacing and waterproofing.
Meaning.Example: The road crew spread hot tar to seal the cracks in the pavement.

Situation.Vi: Công nhân làm đường đổ nhựa đường lên mặt đường để bịt kín các khe nứt.
Situation.En: Construction workers apply hot tar to seal cracks in roads.

Situation.Vi: Hắc ín được dùng để làm kín mái nhà truyền thống.
Situation.En: Tar was traditionally used to waterproof rooftops and ships.

Meaning.Vi: đổ nhựa đường; làm dính bết (như hắc ín)
Meaning.En: To coat or cover something, especially a road or surface, with tar; also, to make something sticky or messy.
Meaning.Example: The workers tarred the road before laying the final layer of asphalt.

Situation.Vi: Công nhân đổ nhựa đường lên mặt đường trước khi lát gạch.
Situation.En: Workers tar the road surface before applying the final asphalt layer.

Situation.Vi: Anh ấy bị dính đầy nhựa đường khi làm việc ngoài trời nắng.
Situation.En: He got tar all over his boots while working outside on a hot day.
